title: Technical Intern
descriptionHtml:
Technical Intern

Location: Birmingham AL
Duration: ~6 months (summer/semester options available) with potential for full time
Comp: $15 - $25/hr depending on experience and location
Reports to: CTO


The role:
We're looking for interns who are curious about how things work and are impatient to get their hands on real problems. You won't be doing busywork. You'll be embedded with experienced engineers, working on production systems, and learning by shipping — not just watching.

Depending on your interests, you could work on:

  • Software development (React/Next.js, Go, TypeScript, Python)

  • DevOps and cloud infrastructure (Docker, AWS, Azure, Heroku)

  • Data engineering and analytics (SQL, dbt, Grafana, Looker, Snowflake)

  • Internal IT systems and security

  • Hardware management

  • A combination of the above — we'll figure it out together

Apply if you:

  • Are genuinely curious about software, data, or infrastructure — not just looking for a line on your resume

  • Have built something on your own, even if it was small or messy

  • Get energized by ambiguity rather than paralyzed by it

Nice to haves (but not dealbreakers):

  • Pursuing or recently completed a degree in CS, Data Science, IT, or similar

  • Familiarity with Git, Docker, SQL, or any cloud platform

  • Previous internship or project experience

Why Linq:

  • Learn more about what you want to do in 6 months than most peers will in 3 years

  • Potential to be evaluated for a full-time role
